session.warningCopy: You have been inactive for a while. Confirm now if you want to stay signed in.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.heroSubtitle: Set up your account to upload training data, manage segments, and track analytics over time.

confirm.title: Confirm account
confirm.heroSubtitle: Confirm your account with the verification code so access to your training console is fully enabled.

profile.title: Profile
profile.heroSubtitle: Maintain your core profile data for training and collaboration.
profile.sectionProfileCopy: Name, contact, and training profile in one place.
profile.preferencesCopy: Language, units, and default workout scope.

ui.starterDescription: Starter access with limited planning, saved plans, and AI coaching.
ui.deletionPendingCopy: Your account is scheduled for deletion on {date}.
ui.deletionRequestCopy: Request account deletion to start a 28-day grace period before your account is removed.
ui.deletionRequestConfirm: Request account deletion? This starts the 28-day grace period.
ui.deletionReadOnly: Most write actions are disabled until you cancel deletion or the deadline is reached.

planDescriptions.plus: Upgrade for expanded limits and smoother day-to-day training workflows.
planDescriptions.pro: Advanced analytics, deeper collaboration features, and priority processing.
planDescriptions.premium: Full feature set with maximum limits and premium performance tooling.

profile.sectionUpgradeCopy: Migrate your account to Plus, Pro, or Premium via PayPal Checkout.
profile.sectionDeletionCopy: Start a deletion request with a 28-day grace period before the account is permanently removed.

uploadPage.title: FIT Upload
uploadPage.heroSubtitle: Upload single FIT files or full ZIP files.
uploadPage.headerCopy: Select one or more files and start the import.
uploadPage.privateCopy: Only you can see the imported workouts.
uploadPage.shareWithGroupsCopy: All workouts in this upload job are shared with the selected groups.
uploadPage.groupShareHint: This sharing setting applies to all workouts in this upload job.

login.title: Sign in
login.heroSubtitle: Sign in to continue with workouts, segments, and analytics in your training workspace.

auth.heroSubtitle: Choose what you want to do next: analyze workouts, compare segments, review trends, or upload new activities.
auth.activityCopy: New shared workouts and group activity at a glance.
auth.myInvitesCopy: Open group invites waiting for your response.

guest.heroSubtitle: Upload workouts, analyze performance and segments, and move between map, timeline, and training data.
guest.platformCopy: Sign in or create an account to continue.
guest.featureUploadCopy: Import FIT and ZIP files and track processing.
guest.featureSegmentsCopy: Map-based segment creation, elevation profiles, and best efforts.
guest.featureAnalyticsCopy: FTP, CP, and load trends in a dedicated analytics view.

tiles.workoutCopy: Find recent sessions fast, compare key metrics, and jump straight into chart and map.
tiles.segmentsCopy: Compare your segments, review best efforts, and see where you have improved.
tiles.analyticsCopy: Track training load, FTP, and performance trends over longer periods.
tiles.uploadCopy: Upload new workouts and keep your training history up to date.
tiles.groupsCopy: Create groups and share your workouts and segments with others.
tiles.feedCopy: Get updates from members of your groups about new workouts and segments.

upload.hintNoGroups: You are currently not a member of any group. Uploads stay private.

upload.errorSelectFile: Please select at least one file.
upload.errorSelectGroupOrPrivate: Select at least one group or upload as private.

upload.infoFileUploaded: File uploaded. Import job is starting ...
upload.storedWorkoutLimitExceeded: Stored workout limit exceeded: {used} / {limit}. Upgrade your plan before uploading more workouts.
upload.fileStatusFilterEmpty: No failed files in this view.

dashboardNewPage.libraryCopy: Premium list view with KPI cards instead of a classic table.

library.searchHint: Tip: use free search or scopes like power:225, power > 200, hr <= 150, np:240, distance:40, date:2018-03.
library.splitterAria: Resize workout list and detail area
library.selectAtLeastOneGroup: Please select at least one group.

dashboardNewPage.subtitle: Browse your workouts, compare duration, distance, and power, and jump straight into chart and map.
dashboardNewPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by workout, date, or metric ...
dashboardNewPage.emptyFavoritesCopy: Turn off the favorites filter or mark more workouts as favorites.

dashboardNewPage.mapCopy: Track, segment ranges, and map context.
dashboardNewPage.distanceAxisUnavailable: Only available when distance data is present.
dashboardNewPage.createSegmentActive: Create Segment mode is active. Drag across the chart to create a new segment.
dashboardNewPage.createGpsSegmentActive: Create GPS Segment mode is active. Drag across the chart to create a GPS segment.

messages.workoutLibraryLoadFailed: Workout library could not be loaded.
messages.workoutOpenFailed: Workout could not be loaded or is not shared.

messages.sharedWorkoutDetailCopy: Power, heart rate, cadence, speed, and altitude of the shared workout with direct segment interaction.

segmentsPage.title: Segments
segmentsPage.subtitle: Define and analyze segments.
segmentsPage.mapCopy: Select two points on the map and generate a segment directly from the routed path.
segmentsPage.btnCreateTitle: Enable point selection mode. Then click two points on the map to define the segment endpoints.
segmentsPage.lookupTitle: Generate the segment from the two selected points, including the route, elevation profile and place labels.
segmentsPage.insightsCopy: Compare best efforts and use the elevation profile of the selected segment as a second reading next to the map.
segmentsPage.bestEffortsEmpty: No best efforts are available for this segment yet.
segmentsPage.elevationEmpty: Select a segment on the map to see its elevation profile.
segmentsPage.workoutContextCopy: Use the chart as a complementary analysis surface for segment ranges and manual editing inside the loaded workout.

analyticsPage.title: Workout Analytics
analyticsPage.subtitle: Track training load, FTP progression, and critical-power trends in a focused, data-driven analytics workspace with direct drill-down into workout and map.
analyticsPage.loadModelCopy: Daily and aggregated views on training load, freshness, and fatigue.
analyticsPage.thresholdCopy: Development of functional threshold power across longer time windows.
analyticsPage.powerCurveCopy: Compare power profiles and time series across multiple aggregation levels.
analyticsPage.workoutContextCopy: Drill down into the selected workout after clicking an analysis point.
analyticsPage.spatialCopy: Map view as the spatial companion to the selected workout from analytics.

coachingPage.title: Coaching
coachingPage.heroSubtitle: Define your planning goal, weekly availability, and event context first. This first version focuses on a clean planning intake before we wire the actual training-plan engine behind it.

sections.savedPlansCopy: Recent plan versions can be reloaded here, so you can compare and iterate instead of overwriting the latest result.
sections.currentTrainingStateCopy: Current load and performance markers from your existing workout history are folded into the generated plan.
sections.generatedPlanCopy: The first MVP will render structured weekly blocks here before we move to calendar-level interaction.
sections.planSetupCopy: Capture the goal and constraints first, then use them as the basis for generated training blocks.

goal.eventCopy: Plan toward a target date with duration, terrain, distance, and elevation in mind.
goal.powerCopy: Target a specific power duration such as sprint, 1 min, 4 min, 8 min, or FTP.

placeholders.noPlanGenerated: No plan has been generated yet. Once the planning engine is connected, this section will render week-by-week training blocks with workout intent, duration, and progression.
placeholders.weekStructure: Week-based structure with reusable daily workout cards
placeholders.goalMapping: Clear mapping between training goal, availability, and session prescription
placeholders.extensionPoint: Later extension point for regeneration, manual edits, and save-to-calendar
placeholders.week1Copy: Initial load calibration based on the selected goal, available days, and preferred planning style.
placeholders.week2Copy: Progression block with the first meaningful stimulus shift once the athlete baseline is established.
placeholders.week3Copy: Future weeks will expand here with recovery logic, goal-specific sessions, and event tapering where relevant.
placeholders.additionalNotes: Optional constraints, preferences, or event-specific notes.

athleteMode.currentCopy: Use recent load, fatigue, and current training state as planning input.
athleteMode.historicalCopy: Treat older data as a reference profile only, not as current readiness.

style.conservativeCopy: More cautious progression and more recovery margin.
style.balancedCopy: Even split between stimulus, recovery, and steady build.
style.ambitiousCopy: Higher load progression for users who can absorb more work.

review.unplannedReason: This workout did not match one of the planned sessions in the same week.
review.noSessionReview: No review result available for this session yet.

commentary.title: Coach Commentary
commentary.noneYet: No AI coach commentary has been generated for this week yet.

statusMessages.adjustmentApplied: Adjustment from week {weekNumber} applied to week {nextWeek}.
statusMessages.reviewUpdated: Plan review updated from actual workouts.
statusMessages.previewGenerated: Preview generated. Save it if you want to keep this version.

sessionTitle.vo2ThresholdBlend: VO2-threshold blend · 3 x 8 min progressive efforts
sessionTitle.recoverySpinLowFatigue: Recovery spin · easy circulation and low fatigue
sessionTitle.enduranceSupportVolume: Endurance ride · low intensity support volume
sessionTitle.recoverySpinLightCirculation: Recovery spin · easy cadence and light circulation
sessionTitle.recoverySpinLowStrain: Recovery spin · easy cadence and low strain
sessionTitle.enduranceFreshness: Endurance ride · aerobic support and freshness maintenance
sessionTitle.sweetspot312: Sweetspot session · 3 x 12 min controlled pressure
sessionTitle.thresholdSupportRide: Threshold support ride · over-under style aerobic control
sessionTitle.strengthEnduranceRide: Strength endurance ride · low cadence climbing blocks
sessionTitle.tempoSessionSupport: Tempo session · controlled aerobic support work
sessionTitle.recoverySpinRelaxed: Recovery spin · easy cadence and relaxed aerobic volume
sessionTitle.enduranceAerobicSupport: Endurance ride · low intensity aerobic support
sessionTitle.enduranceOpeners: Endurance ride · steady aerobic support with a few openers
sessionTitle.sweetspotSustainedSupport: Sweetspot session · sustained aerobic support blocks
sessionTitle.tempoRideThreshold: Tempo ride · controlled pressure just below threshold
sessionTitle.sweetspotRide220: Sweetspot ride · 2 x 20 min steady pressure
sessionTitle.recoverySpinShortEasy: Recovery spin · short and easy aerobic support

sessionTitle.structuredKeySession: Structured key session · intensity blocks matched to {terrain} pacing
sessionTitle.tempoSweetspotSupport: Tempo / sweetspot support · build sustainable event pace
sessionTitle.aerobicSupportFueling: Aerobic support ride · controlled pressure and fueling practice
sessionTitle.recoverySpinAbsorbLoad: Recovery spin · absorb previous load and maintain freshness
sessionTitle.easyEnduranceCadenceFreedom: Easy endurance ride · low intensity with cadence freedom
sessionTitle.longEventSimulation: Long event simulation ride · duration and fueling focus for {terrain} demands

sessionNote.primaryEnduranceAnchor: Primary endurance anchor of the week.
sessionNote.keyIntensityDay: Key intensity day matched to the chosen goal.
sessionNote.controlledSupportWork: Controlled support work to build repeatable training load.
sessionNote.keepIntensityReduceStress: Keep intensity but reduce total stress.
sessionNote.adjustedCarryForwardHard: key intensity session carried forward after a missed hard day
sessionNote.adjustedReinforceLongAnchor: long aerobic anchor reinforced after the previous week missed it
sessionNote.adjustedTrimRecovery: trimmed to protect recovery after extra unplanned volume
sessionNote.adjustedSimplifiedAfterSubstitutions: simplified from hard to medium after repeated substitutions

reviewSummary.noMatchingWorkouts: No matching workouts were found in this plan window, so the week could not be executed against the stored plan.
reviewSummary.severalMissed: Several planned sessions were missed or replaced. The week drifted clearly away from the original intent.
reviewSummary.partlyOnTrack: The week stayed partly on track, but some sessions were replaced or completed below target.
reviewSummary.matchedPlannedStructure: The week matched the planned structure well and stayed close to the intended training objective.

recommendationDetail.protectLongAnchor: The long session was missed. Try to recover that endurance stimulus next week, but keep it low intensity instead of turning it into another hard day.
recommendationDetail.reduceNextWeek: This week drifted clearly away from the plan. Cut next week by roughly 10–15% and keep only one key intensity day until consistency returns.
recommendationDetail.simplifyNextBlock: Several sessions were substituted. Keep the next structured workout simpler and more achievable before progressing again.
recommendationDetail.keepProgressionSteady: The week matched the plan well. Keep the current structure and allow the next planned progression step without adding extra sessions.
recommendationDetail.manageUnplannedVolume: There were multiple extra workouts. Either turn some of that spontaneous volume into planned easy endurance, or protect recovery by removing filler sessions next week.
recommendationDetail.stayWithCurrentTemplate: No major correction is needed. Keep the next week aligned with the existing plan and monitor consistency.
recommendationDetail.replaceKeyStimulus: A hard session was missed. Move one quality workout into the next available fresh day instead of adding extra intensity on top of the week.

hero.title: Groups
hero.subtitle: Private training groups, invites, and a feed for new uploads and shared comparisons. This first view is intentionally a clean framework for the next rollout stages.

sections.myGroupsCopy: Group overview with role, members, and status.
sections.activityCopy: New shared workouts from your groups appear here first.
sections.myInvitesCopy: Incoming group invites you can accept or reject.
sections.sentByMeCopy: Invites you sent for your groups, including current status.
sections.detailsCopy: Home remains the hub and feed. Management, members, and invites are cleanly handled in a dedicated Groups view.

modal.descriptionPlaceholderCreate: Short context, focus, or purpose of the group
modal.descriptionPlaceholderEdit: Short description of what this group is for.
modal.visibilityHint: `Private` is the recommended default for the first rollout.
modal.inviteHint: In the first rollout, we invite existing app users via email address.
modal.presetTraining30d: Training sessions from the last 30 days
modal.presetTraining90d: Training sessions from the last 90 days
modal.presetHint: Segments are currently published as your complete owned segment set to this group.

view.emptyGroupsBody: Create your first private training group here. Home stays intentionally read-only.
view.emptyInvitesBody: Only group invites addressed to you appear here.
view.emptySentInvitesBody: Invites you triggered for your groups appear here.
